The permanent residents seem to like it. Not a tourist park. The nearby harbour is very dog unfriendly so activities very limited if u have a dog.
Almost no phone signal.
No frills, no fuss Caravan park. Friendly staff always trying to impress. Out of the way but quiet.

Thankyou to Western port harbour I stayed here with my husband  and  enjoyed my stay here very much A beautiful peaceful park lovely friendly staff and residents  clean facilities and plenty of wildlife 🙂🥰defently recomend
Ace place suits the older generation and an ideal spot management super helpful and friendly and went out of the way for us definitely 10/10  here
abbsolutly lovley and look forward to progress
Very good hostess and nice and quiet
Very friendly staff and fantastic location
Absolutely beautiful park great management great tenants,  l can't recommend this place highly enough,, extremely impressive establishment,  well done guy's extremely satisfied
